title: Mukurthi National Park
tagline: Mukurthi National Park — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Mukurthi National Park is a 78.46 km2 (30.29 sq mi) national park in the western Nilgiris mountains of Tamil Nadu in South India.
overview.description: Mukurthi National Park is a 78.46 km2 (30.29 sq mi) national park in the western Nilgiris mountains of Tamil Nadu in South India. It was created to protect its keystone species, the Nilgiri tahr. It is part of Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve, India's first International Biosphere Reserve. As part of the Western Ghats, it is a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1 July 2012.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

topPlaces.name: Anginda peak
topPlaces.description: Anginda peak (അങ്ങിണ്ട മുടി) is a mountain in the Nilgiri Hills of the Western Ghats on the border of the Nilgiris District of Tamil Nadu and Palakkad district of Kerala, India. It has an elevation of 2,383 metres (7,818 ft) and is the highest peak in Silent Valley National Park.

topPlaces.name: Kolaribetta
topPlaces.description: Kolaribetta is the second highest peak in the Nilgiri hills of the Western Ghats, located in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated in Udagamandalam taluk of Nilgiris district, Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mukurthi National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mukurthi National Park is Apr – Jun, Sep – Oct. Summers are 10–22°C and winters are -6–10°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mukurthi National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (58 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mukurthi National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mukurthi National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mukurthi National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Mukurthi National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mukurthi National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nilambur Elephant Reserve, Anginda peak, Kolaribetta.
